project.name: Black Shirt Creator Offer Page
project.notes: Create a future website sprint for a Black Shirt Bourbon Society creator-offer page. This is planning only; App Store Connect setup, Firestore campaign docs, and BarrelBook app changes are out of scope for this saved record.

required: /p/blackshirt renders a mobile-friendly creator landing page with Black Shirt Bourbon Society styling.
The page supports Plus Annual and Pro Annual offer CTAs and clearly explains the 20% first-year discount.
Raw App Store custom codes are available only in a manual fallback or disclosure section.
Promo pages remain noindex,nofollow, are excluded from sitemap, and robots disallow promo paths and aliases.
Tests cover the new promo page, redirect, metadata, and code visibility behavior.
Setup notes document required App Store Connect codes and Firestore campaign documents.

items.title: Add Black Shirt creator campaign configuration
items.description: Add the Black Shirt Bourbon Society campaign to the existing promo campaign architecture with two annual-plan offer options.
acceptanceCriteria: Campaign route is /p/blackshirt
Campaign alias is /blackshirt
Plus Annual offer uses BLACKSHIRTPLUS20 and 500 redemptions in setup notes
Pro Annual offer uses BLACKSHIRTPRO20 and 500 redemptions in setup notes
Offer copy explains 20% off the first year for either annual plan

items.title: Build bespoke Black Shirt offer page
items.description: Create a Black Shirt Bourbon Society themed landing page using dark black, antique gold, warm barrel tones, ornamental borders, and co-branded BarrelBook treatment.
acceptanceCriteria: Design reflects Black Shirt Bourbon Society public styling
Page is responsive on mobile and desktop
Page presents Plus Annual and Pro Annual offer cards
Primary CTAs use existing barrelbook://promo/{slug} handoff
No direct Apple redeem URLs are exposed as public redirects

items.title: Hide raw codes behind manual fallback
items.description: Keep the offer simple while reducing casual code discovery by exposing raw Apple custom codes only in a manual fallback or disclosure area.
acceptanceCriteria: Raw codes are not the primary visual CTA
Manual fallback copy explains when to use the codes
Copy code behavior works for both Plus and Pro codes
The page remains usable if app deep-link handoff fails

items.title: Harden promo discoverability controls
items.description: Keep promo pages out of normal search discovery and avoid code leakage through redirects.
acceptanceCriteria: Promo pages continue to emit noindex,nofollow metadata
/p/blackshirt is not added to sitemap
robots disallows /p/ and promo aliases including /blackshirt
/blackshirt redirects only to /p/blackshirt
No direct Apple redeem redirect is added for this campaign

items.title: Add tests and setup documentation
items.description: Update promo checks and document the manual App Store Connect and Firestore setup required to launch the campaign.
acceptanceCriteria: Promo tests cover /p/blackshirt
Tests cover /blackshirt redirect behavior
Tests verify hidden/manual code visibility expectations
Setup notes name required App Store custom codes and expected product IDs
Setup notes specify Firestore campaign docs remain manual operational setup
